headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Launching XSP Binary Options Prediction Suite
summary: Cboe Global Markets has launched the first products in its new Cboe Predicts prediction markets suite, listing Mini-S&P 500 Index (XSP) binary options (XSPBW and XSPBX) on Interactive Brokers, with access expected at Charles Schwab and other retail platforms. By combining simple yes/no payouts, planned XSP vertical spreads, and a robust education program, Cboe is pushing prediction-style trading into a regulated options framework aimed at newer retail traders. We’ll now assess how this push...
